Home / Services / Stump Grinding & Removal

Stump Grinding & Removal

Remove unsightly tree stumps and reclaim your yard with our professional stump grinding services.

After a tree is removed, the remaining stump can be an eyesore and a potential hazard. At Adams Tree Service, we offer professional stump grinding and removal services to completely eliminate tree stumps from your property. Our stump grinders are powerful machines that can grind stumps of any size below ground level, allowing you to reclaim your yard for planting, landscaping, or other uses. Stump grinding is a much more efficient and less disruptive option than traditional stump removal methods, which often involve digging up the entire root system. We carefully assess the stump's location and surrounding environment before grinding, taking precautions to protect underground utilities and nearby structures. After grinding the stump, we remove the debris and fill the hole with topsoil, leaving your yard clean and ready for replanting. In Oklahoma City, with its clay soil, stump grinding is particularly beneficial as it helps improve drainage and prevent soil compaction. We also offer root removal services to eliminate any remaining roots that may interfere with future landscaping projects. Our team is experienced in handling all types of stumps, including those from large trees or those located in difficult-to-access areas. We are committed to providing efficient, affordable, and environmentally friendly stump grinding services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Assessment - We evaluate the stump's size, location, and surrounding environment.
  2. 02 Step 2: Stump Grinding - We grind the stump below ground level using specialized equipment.
  3. 03 Step 3: Debris Removal - We remove all debris and fill the hole with topsoil.
  4. 04 Step 4: Cleanup - We leave your property clean and ready for replanting.

Benefits

  • Complete stump removal
  • Reclaimed yard space
  • Improved drainage and soil conditions
  • Prevention of pest infestations

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does stump grinding take?

The time it takes to grind a stump depends on its size and location. Most stumps can be ground in a few hours or less. We will provide you with an estimated timeframe before starting the work.

Will stump grinding damage my lawn?

We take precautions to minimize damage to your lawn during stump grinding. However, some minor damage is unavoidable. We will repair any damage to the best of our ability and reseed the area if necessary.

Can I plant a new tree in the same spot after stump grinding?

Yes, you can plant a new tree in the same spot after stump grinding. However, it's important to remove any remaining roots and amend the soil with compost or other organic matter to ensure the new tree thrives.
